Step 1: Restate what the question is asking.
The question asks for the determinant of the matrix $A = \begin{pmatrix} 0 & 1 & 2 \\ 7 & 8 & 3 \\ 6 & 5 & 4 \end{pmatrix}$.

Step 2: Identify the relevant information or constraints.
The matrix is $A = \begin{pmatrix} 0 & 1 & 2 \\ 7 & 8 & 3 \\ 6 & 5 & 4 \end{pmatrix}$. I must calculate $\det(A)$ using the formula for a $3 \times 3$ determinant.

Step 3: Evaluate each option against those constraints.
I will calculate the determinant using cofactor expansion along the first row:
$\det(A) = 0 \cdot \det\begin{pmatrix} 8 & 3 \\ 5 & 4 \end{pmatrix} - 1
